original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Aiden, Oliver, Sophia, and Henry. Aiden told you that Henry is a knight if and only if Henry is a knave. Oliver said, "Sophia is a knave and Henry is a knight." Sophia expressed that Henry is a knight. Henry was heard saying, "Oliver is a knave if and only if Oliver is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
info_removed_type: "the specific statements made by each inhabitant"
